summary: The diff implements a comprehensive Premium 3D Solar Energy single-page website with all major requirements addressed. All 8 requirements appear to be implemented: dark mode theme (REQ-1), hero section with 3D R3F model and animated background (REQ-2), animated stats counters (REQ-3), product showcase grid (REQ-4), savings calculator with sliders (REQ-5), contact/footer section (REQ-6), responsive layout with animations (REQ-7), and sticky navbar with hamburger menu (REQ-8). A minor concern is that the logo image asset is not used as the navbar uses an inline icon approach instead. The implementation appears largely complete with no significant missing requirements and minimal hallucinated features.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity provider and actor hooks (useInternetIdentity, useActor) are included in the frontend despite the constraint explicitly prohibiting user authentication or Internet Identity login.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request non-goals explicitly state 'User authentication or Internet Identity login' should not be implemented. The diff includes useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, and wraps the app in InternetIdentityProvider in main.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query (QueryClientProvider, useQuery) infrastructure is set up in main.tsx despite no backend queries being needed for a UI-only application.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request states no backend data persistence or canister storage is needed. While useQueries.ts is a placeholder, QueryClientProvider wraps the entire app unnecessarily.
